=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/instanceOfSchema_preview.ts(7,24): warning TS377042: Consider using Schema.is instead of instanceof for Effect Schema types. effect(instanceOfSchema)


==== /.src/instanceOfSchema_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics instanceOfSchema:warning
    import { Schema } from "effect"
    
    class User extends Schema.Class<User>("User")({ name: Schema.String }) {}
    declare const value: unknown
    export const preview = value instanceof User
                           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377042: Consider using Schema.is instead of instanceof for Effect Schema types. effect(instanceOfSchema)
